archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) fused with Retro-Futurism (The Technical Look)
vibe: Supreme, premium, evidence-not-hype, live instrumentation, authoritative telemetry

hierarchy.h1_hero_metric: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-[5.5rem] font-black tracking-tighter leading-none font-mono text-white

rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Metrics, data, and hashes must use JetBrains Mono.
Overlines/Widget Titles MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

surfaces_and_layout.strategy: GRID BORDERS (The Technical Look) - No soft shadows.
surfaces_and_layout.container: Use a border-collapse style layout. Create the grid by wrapping widgets in a parent with `bg-[#1C1C1C] p-[1px] gap-[1px]` and set all child items to `bg-[#0A0A0A]`. This creates perfect 1px hairline technical borders.
surfaces_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use p-8 or p-10 inside metric cards. Let the numbers breathe.

bento_grid_structure.hero_token_metric: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 row-span-2 h-full flex flex-col justify-between

background_and_visuals.animated_network_field: Implement a pure CSS/SVG moving grid or TSParticles network background behind the UI. Keep opacity very low (5-10%) to ensure data contrast.
background_and_visuals.noise_texture: Overlay a fixed `pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03]` SVG grain/noise texture across the entire viewport to give a premium matte finish.

motion_and_interactions.live_pulse: CSS animation `@keyframes pulse` applied to a 6px red (#FF3B30) dot next to the 'LIVE' timestamp.
motion_and_interactions.number_counters: Use Framer Motion `useSpring` and `useTransform` to animate the token usage numbers counting up rapidly.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_reveals: Add `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 15 }}` to bento grid children with staggered delays (0.05s increments).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must turn pure white on hover with `transition-colors duration-200`. Row hovers in the matrix should trigger a subtle `bg-[#121212]`.

components.name: Navigation / Header
components.rules: Glassmorphism background (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl) with border-b border-[#1C1C1C]. Left: QIRA text logo in Cabinet Grotesk. Right: Pulsing red dot + 'LIVE OBSERVATORY' + Current UTC timestamp (monospace).

components.name: Token Usage Hero Metric
components.rules: Displays all-time tokens (e.g., '14,204,910,394'). Use JetBrains Mono, extreme scaling. Subtitle: 'TOTAL TOKENS PROCESSED'. Optical alignment: bottom-left anchored.

components.name: Daily Usage Ledger
components.rules: Use Recharts or Shadcn Chart. Monochromatic bars (pure white for latest, muted gray for past). Hide default axes, use a minimal custom tooltip. No grid lines.

components.name: Project Matrix Scanner
components.rules: Shadcn Table component. Hide external borders. Columns: Repo, Git State, Token Burn, Last Scanned. Align numbers right, text left. Use JetBrains Mono for table cells.

components.name: Verification Proof Layer
components.rules: Add subtle CSS scanlines (`repeating-linear-gradient`). Text is strictly monospace. Show Snapshot Hash (truncated), Schema Version, and a simulated scrolling log of 'Logs Withheld'.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Deep black background ensures white text is > 4.5:1.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: Codebase uses .js files, NOT .tsx. Implement React components using standard ES6 modules (.jsx/.js).
Install dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion recharts tsparticles @tsparticles/engine @tsparticles/react`.
DO NOT use standard Shadcn Card default styles (no rounded corners, no standard borders). Override them using the Grid Borders strategy defined above.
Ensure all big numbers use a library like `framer-motion` to count up on initial render.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the bento layout to maintain absolute control over the hairlines.
Avoid color overload. The UI must be stark monochrome (#0A0A0A to #FFFFFF) with ONLY the live pulse using color (#FF3B30).
